finding_results.notes: Inserted three explicit interior beats in the bureaucracy run (financial self-assessment, compulsive tactile check tied to blackout memory, and somatic emotional release) to maintain close-third access through decision pressure.
Removed repeated 'By the time' transition phrasing and recast the cited transition zones with non-matching syntax anchored to queue friction, payment failure, and end-of-day intake pressure.

summary: Chapter 11 received targeted prose/copyedit fixes: interiority density was restored in the municipal process sequence, transition syntax was diversified, and the chapter's raw specificity, voice register, and continuity constraints were preserved.
